description: Timeline tab shows 'Nessuna voce in scaletta' even though 8 event_timeline rows were inserted via service-role for this entry. Tab is empty and Overview KPI shows SCALETTA=0. Likely RLS misconfiguration on event_timeline for the WP owner of calendar_entries, or the SELECT query joins on a column that the seed left null.
evidence: screenshots/06-tab-timeline.png, screenshots/26-timeline-rendered.png; seed-state.json confirms timeline_seeded:8; service-role verifies rows persisted

description: event_timeline.is_critical has NOT NULL constraint without a default. Seed inserts that omit is_critical fail with PG error 'null value in column is_critical violates not-null constraint'. Inconsistent with TimelineTab UX where is_critical is optional. Add DEFAULT false or make column nullable.
evidence: Seed log: 'timeline null value in column is_critical of relation event_timeline violates not-null constraint'

description: couple_preferences.styles enum rejects 'Classic elegance' (wedding_style enum has a different allowed list). Insert silently fails — couple_preferences row never persisted. Either expand the enum to include front-end label, or normalize labels at write time.
evidence: Seed log: 'couple_preferences invalid input value for enum wedding_style: "Classic elegance"'

description: Overview KPI BUDGET shows €0 even though wedding.value_amount is €32.000 (visible in hero). KPI is tied to budget_categories table only, while hero shows the deal value — UX clarification needed (or pre-fill budget categories from quote).
FALSE-POSITIVE — .exe upload IS correctly rejected with toast 'mime type application/x-msdownload is not supported' (Fix N is working). The test's locator missed the toast position. No action needed.
evidence: screenshots/29-docs-after-exe-upload.png shows the rejection toast top-right

description: Contract tab shows 'Nessun contratto ancora.' but the 'Nuova bozza' (Genera contratto) button IS available top-right (post-fix QuoteEditor). 'Scarica PDF' absent is acceptable since no contract has been generated yet. The original test heuristic was too strict.
Repeated console errors '400 Bad Request' on initial page load and during a tab switch (analytics→home transition). Source unclear without devtools — likely a stale fetch on a missing analytics view.
evidence: console output during run: 'Failed to load resource: 400'
